query:
UPDATE sync_logs 
SET status = 'success', error_message = NULL 
WHERE status = 'error' 
  AND error_message LIKE 'Auto-cleared%';
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3zL6E4esQEHiYzS.root --database WPSwtnWiTSyEVhTdqqAYk7 --execute UPDATE sync_logs 
SET status = 'success', error_message = NULL 
WHERE status = 'error' 
  AND error_message LIKE 'Auto-cleared%';
